name: Ubiquiti Intercom Flush Mount
title: Ubiquiti Intercom Flush Mount
title_extended: Ubiquiti Intercom Flush Mount - Flush Mount Enclosure for Intercom
short_description: Flush mount enclosure for Ubiquiti Intercom system. Weatherproof, UV-stabilized polycarbonate.
description: The Ubiquiti Intercom Flush Mount is a low-profile mounting solution designed specifically for the Ubiquiti Intercom system. This weatherproof enclosure allows for a seamless integration of the intercom into any wall, enhancing aesthetics while protecting the device from the elements. Constructed with UV-stabilized polycarbonate with a PU coating, the enclosure safeguards the intercom from dust, dirt, and moisture. This weatherproof design ensures reliable operation even in harsh outdoor conditions. Whether you're installing the intercom in a residential hallway, a commercial office, or even an outdoor setting, the flush-mount design ensures a clean and unobtrusive integration.

detailed_description.heading: Seamless Integration
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti Intercom Flush Mount is a low-profile mounting solution designed specifically for the Ubiquiti Intercom system. This weatherproof enclosure allows for a seamless integration of the intercom into any wall, enhancing aesthetics while protecting the device from the elements. Constructed with UV-stabilized polycarbonate with a PU coating, the enclosure safeguards the intercom from dust, dirt, and moisture. This weatherproof design ensures reliable operation even in harsh outdoor conditions. Whether you're installing the intercom in a residential hallway, a commercial office, or even an outdoor setting, the flush-mount design ensures a clean and unobtrusive integration.

detailed_description.heading: Effortless Installation
detailed_description.text: The UACC-Intercom-FM is designed for a straightforward installation process. The enclosure uses standard mounting techniques, allowing for quick and easy integration into your existing infrastructure. The enclosure perfectly accommodates the intercom's dimensions and connection points, ensuring a secure and functional fit. Installing the intercom with the UACC-Intercom-FM does not compromise its core functionalities. You can continue to enjoy all the communication features and benefits offered by the Ubiquiti Intercom system.
